perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a man wearing a plaid flat cap and sunglasses standing outside a modern glass building with a blue and white 'Store' sign. He gestures toward the building and enters through a glass door. (2) Inside, the scene transitions to a bright, open retail space filled with people. He walks through various sections, pointing at displays of smart glasses and VR headsets. People are seen trying on VR equipment. (3) He stands in front of a massive, curved digital screen displaying high-definition sports and lifestyle content. (4) He moves back outside to a sunny sidewalk area, continuing to speak directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. An image of a female celebrity (G.E.M.) is briefly overlaid on the screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic music begins immediately. A man's voice enters, speaking in an energetic and friendly tone in Mandarin. (2) As he enters the store, the background music continues at a steady volume. Ambient sounds of a retail environment, including muffled chatter from a crowd and a distant PA or guide's voice, are audible. (3) The man's narration remains the primary audio focus, maintaining a high-pitched and enthusiastic tone. (4) Toward the end, a second male voice (off-screen) briefly responds to the main speaker, creating a short conversational moment before the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese appear at the bottom, translating the spoken narration. Social media icons for Facebook and Instagram with '3c有意思tim哥' and '3ctim' are in the top left. (2) Decorative Text: Large labels like 'Meta x Ray-Ban', 'Meta Quest', and '無敵多!' (Incredibly many!) appear as stylized overlays to emphasize key points. (3) Effect Text: A label '（國際TIM）' and 'content' appear briefly over a shot of the large screen. A caption '可惜啦' (What a pity) appears when he discusses missing a celebrity.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Store Exploration -> Reflection and Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim), approximately 5 staff members, and 6 customers visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a plaid flat cap, brown-tinted sunglasses, a black 'ROOTS CANADA' sweatshirt with a leaf logo, and a beaded bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The indoor setting is a minimalist, modern tech store with white ceilings, exposed pipes, and wood-paneled display walls. The outdoor setting features a modern glass-facade building and a paved walkway under a clear blue sky.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright natural sunlight and professional indoor retail lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a first-person vlog experience of visiting the Meta Store in Burlingame, specifically focusing on the new Meta x Ray-Ban collaboration and Meta Quest products while sharing personal impressions of the retail space.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is showcasing specific brand products (Meta, Ray-Ban) in a retail environment as a tech influencer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Signature greeting and tech-focused narrative style typical of '3c有意思tim哥'.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses variety-show style captions to maintain high viewer engagement and emphasizes the creator's regret about missing a celebrity appearance to add personal relatability.
